class.name: PlayFabMatchTicket
class.description: Returned by [method PlayFabMultiplayer.create_match_ticket_async]. Ticket progress is pushed through [signal state_changed].

method.name: refresh_async
method.description: Refreshes this tracked ticket snapshot and returns a completion [Signal]. Normal ticket progress is also pushed through [signal state_changed].

method.name: cancel_async
method.description: Requests cancellation and completes when the ticket reaches a cancelled or failed terminal state.

method.name: is_complete
method.description: Returns whether the ticket is matched, cancelled, or failed.

method.name: is_cancelled
method.description: Returns whether the ticket is cancelled.

members.member: Arranged lobby connection string reported to title code.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Emitted when ticket status or completion state changes.

constants.constant: A matchmaking ticket wrapper was created.
